query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, c."tenantId", SUM(c.amount) as total_cents, ROUND(SUM(c.amount)/100.0, 2) as total_reais FROM users u JOIN credits c ON c."professionalId" = u.id WHERE u.email = 'erika@example.com' GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email, c."tenantId" ORDER BY 4
